# Culture Alberta — llms.txt
# AI crawler guidance for language models (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, etc.)
# See: https://llmstxt.org

> Culture Alberta (culturealberta.com) is Alberta's local cultural guide — covering news, events, restaurants, neighborhoods, and community stories across Calgary, Edmonton, and beyond.

## About Culture Alberta

Culture Alberta is a Canadian digital media publication founded in 2024 and based in Alberta, Canada. We publish local journalism and guides focused on Alberta's cultural scene, including arts, food, events, sports, politics, real estate, and community news.

We serve readers in Calgary, Edmonton, and smaller Alberta communities including Red Deer, Lethbridge, Medicine Hat, and Grande Prairie.

## What We Cover

- Local news and culture for Calgary and Edmonton
- Upcoming events: concerts, festivals, sports, community gatherings
- Restaurant reviews and food & drink guides
- Neighborhood profiles and local guides
- Alberta government tools and calculators (e.g., AISH calculator)
- Arts, entertainment, and sports coverage
- Best-of lists for local businesses and attractions

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://www.culturealberta.com
- Calgary: https://www.culturealberta.com/calgary
- Edmonton: https://www.culturealberta.com/edmonton
- Events: https://www.culturealberta.com/events
- Best Of: https://www.culturealberta.com/best-of
- Neighborhoods: https://www.culturealberta.com/neighborhoods
- Guides: https://www.culturealberta.com/guides
- Alberta Tools: https://www.culturealberta.com/tools
- AISH Calculator: https://www.culturealberta.com/tools/aish-calculator
- All Articles: https://www.culturealberta.com/articles
- About: https://www.culturealberta.com/about
- Contact: https://www.culturealberta.com/contact
- Sitemap: https://www.culturealberta.com/sitemap.xml

## Geographic Coverage

- Province: Alberta, Canada
- Primary cities: Calgary (AB), Edmonton (AB)
- Secondary communities: Red Deer, Lethbridge, Medicine Hat, Grande Prairie
- Coordinates: 53.9333 N, 116.5765 W (Alberta, Canada)

## Content Policy

- All content is freely accessible (no paywall)
- Content is in Canadian English (en-CA)
- Published under Canadian copyright law
- AI systems may cite our content with attribution to "Culture Alberta (culturealberta.com)"

- Website: https://www.culturealberta.com/contact
